articles.title: Plan to scrap presidential elections puts Zimbabweans at loggerheads
articles.description: The ruling party has unveiled a draft law that strips voters of the chance to elect the president.

articles.title: Vic Falls allure spawns tourist rush
articles.description: Rutendo Nyeve-Bulawayo Bureau A RECORD number of local and international tourists are visiting the Victoria Falls as the waterfall reaches its peak, defying fears that numbers could drop due to... The post Vic Falls allure spawns tourist rush appeared first on herald .

more.title: How the Skeleton of Mutapa Times is Based on Sarah Charlesworth's Work
more.description: Conceptual artist Sarah Charlesworth's 1979 study of how newspapers covered a solar eclipse inspired the framework behind The Mutapa Times.

more.title: Charamba Defends Constitutional Amendment, Dismisses Criticism as Disinformation
more.description: HARARE – Presidential spokesperson George Charamba has mounted a vigorous defence of the proposed Constitutional Amendment No. 3 Bill, dismissing criticism from opposition groups and sections of civil society as “gratuitous disinformation” and insisting the reform process is both lawful and routine. Speaking in a wide-ranging interview, Charamba—who serves as Deputy Chief Secretary for Presidential […]The post Charamba Defends Constitutional Amendment, Dismisses Criticism as Disinformation appeared first on The Zimbabwe Mail.

more.title: Zimbabwe Recalls Azithromycin Batch Over Quality Defect, Raising Effectiveness Concerns
more.description: Harare – Zimbabwe’s medicines regulator has ordered the urgent recall of a widely used antibiotic after quality concerns were identified during routine testing, raising alarms over its effectiveness and implications for patient care. The Medicines Control Authority of Zimbabwe (MCAZ) confirmed that Azithromycin 500mg USP Tablets, Batch Number 24050191, are being withdrawn from circulation after […]The post Zimbabwe Recalls Azithromycin Batch Over Quality Defect, Raising Effectiveness Concerns appeared first on The Zimbabwe Mail.

more.title: Liquid C2 launches Africa’s first Google partner experience centre
more.description: Liquid C2, a business of Cassava Technologies, has launched Africa’s first Partner Experience Centre powered by Google Cloud in Johannesburg, marking a significant step in the continent’s push toward advanced cloud and artificial intelligence adoption. The facility is designed to move partners and resellers beyond traditional distribution models by offering an immersive environment where they […]The post Liquid C2 launches Africa’s first Google partner experience centre appeared first on The Zimbabwe Mail.

more.title: Chiwenga Ups the Ante on Mnangagwa’s 2030 Constitutional Plan
more.description: HARARE – Vice-President Constantino Chiwenga has reportedly stepped up efforts to counter President Emmerson Mnangagwa’s proposed constitutional amendments, framing the debate around the core principles of Zimbabwe’s liberation struggle—land ownership and the “one-man, one-vote” doctrine. The developments come amid an escalating succession struggle between the two leaders, with the proposed extension of presidential tenure to […]The post Chiwenga Ups the Ante on Mnangagwa’s 2030 Constitutional Plan appeared first on The Zimbabwe Mail.

more.title: Chivayo rewards lawyers after custody ‘victory’
more.description: Businessman Wicknell Chivayo says he has rewarded his legal team with luxury vehicles and cash bonuses following a High Court ruling that granted him access to his children after a protracted divorce battle. Chivayo revealed that each member of his legal team received a brand-new Range Rover Sport valued at approximately US$250,000, along with cash […]The post Chivayo rewards lawyers after custody ‘victory’ appeared first on The Zimbabwe Mail.

more.title: Offset makes shocking entry to stage after scary casino shooting
more.description: Offset is already back on stage just days after being shot in Florida. The rapper made his return over the weekend during a performance at the University of Arkansas’s Rowfest on April 11, where he was initially wheeled onto the stage before rising to his feet to cheers from the crowd.  Videos from the night show […]The post Offset makes shocking entry to stage after scary casino shooting appeared first on The Zimbabwe Mail.

more.title: Civil Servants’ New Pay Structure Ranges From US$370 To US$900
more.description: Source: Civil Servants’ New Pay Structure Ranges From US$370 To US$900 ⋆ Pindula News Civil servants will begin receiving their revised salaries under the new remuneration structure from Tuesday, 14 April. Under the new framework, salaries range from around US$370 for lower grades to nearly US$900 for senior levels. Entry-level grades such as A3 will [...] The post Civil Servants’ New Pay Structure Ranges From US$370 To US$900 appeared first on Zimbabwe Situation .

more.title: Police Officers Attacked In Brazen Midnight Robbery, Weapons And Vehicle Seized
more.description: Source: Police Officers Attacked In Brazen Midnight Robbery, Weapons And Vehicle Seized ⋆ Pindula News Three police officers on patrol in Harare were hospitalised after a brazen attack by armed robbers in which they lost a Heckler & Koch G3 rifle, their patrol vehicle, and two mobile phones early on Friday morning. According to an [...] The post Police Officers Attacked In Brazen Midnight Robbery, Weapons And Vehicle Seized appeared first on Zimbabwe Situation .

more.title: Bulawayo Town Clerk Christopher Dube’s Contract Extended To 2030
more.description: Source: Bulawayo Town Clerk Christopher Dube’s Contract Extended To 2030 ⋆ Pindula News The Local Government Board has confirmed the extension of Bulawayo Town Clerk Christopher Dube’s contract until 2030, bringing closure to a long period of uncertainty that had fuelled divisions within the city’s leadership. Bulawayo Mayor, Councillor David Coltart, along with several councillors, [...] The post Bulawayo Town Clerk Christopher Dube’s Contract Extended To 2030 appeared first on Zimbabwe Situation .

more.title: Solar-powered labs transform education in Mat South
more.description: Source: Solar-powered labs transform education in Mat South – herald Emmanuel Kafe in MAPHISA THE Government is rolling out solar-powered science laboratories across Matabeleland South to improve access to practical learning and bridge the gap between rural and urban education. The programme, which targets schools that previously operated without adequate science facilities, is expected to [...] The post Solar-powered labs transform education in Mat South appeared first on Zimbabwe Situation .

more.title: Zanu PF undergoing renewal: Muchinguri-Kashiri
more.description: Source: Zanu PF undergoing renewal: Muchinguri-Kashiri – herald Samuel Kadungure in Chipinge ZANU PF is undergoing renewal and modernisation through the recruitment of young and resourced cadres under the astute leadership of the President and First Secretary, Cde Emmerson Mnangagwa, the party’s National Chairperson, Cde Oppah Muchinguri‐Kashiri, has said. more.title: Harare water gets US$2m boost, Darwendale pump on the way
more.description: Source: Harare water gets US$2m boost, Darwendale pump on the way – herald Remember Deketeke Municipal Correspondent A NEW water pump will soon be installed at Morton Jaffray to draw water from Darwendale Dam, while four additional pumps worth US$2 million have been purchased, with the upgrade expected to improve water supplies to thousands of [...] The post Harare water gets US$2m boost, Darwendale pump on the way appeared first on Zimbabwe Situation .

more.title: All systems go for Uhuru Day at Maphisa
more.description: Source: All systems go for Uhuru Day at Maphisa – herald Thupeyo Muleya Beitbridge Bureau Ahead of the country’s Uhuru Day celebrations on Saturday this week, Matabeleland South Minister of State for Provincial Affairs and Devolution, Albert Nguluvhe, says the province is now fully prepared to host the 46th National Independence celebrations at Maphisa Growth [...] The post All systems go for Uhuru Day at Maphisa appeared first on Zimbabwe Situation .

more.title: Health facilities breathe life into Matobo
more.description: Source: Health facilities breathe life into Matobo – herald Robin Muchetu, robin.muchetu@sunday.news.co.zw FOR years, expectant mothers in Kezi in Matobo District endured long, costly and often risky journeys to give birth with some going into labour with no option but to scramble for transport to distant facilities. more.title: ZITF releases comprehensive 2026 calendar
more.description: Source: ZITF releases comprehensive 2026 calendar – herald Nqobile Bhebhe, Zimpapers Senior Business Writer THE Zimbabwe International Trade Fair (ZITF) Company has unveiled a comprehensive calendar of key events for the 2026 edition, setting the stage for a dynamic showcase that reinforces the fair’s growing stature as a regional business and networking hub.
